name: Xochi
address: 1777 Walker St, Houston, TX 77010, United States
menu: Tlayuda de Res (grilled steak, mole negro, quesillo on crispy tortilla)
vibe_blurb: Dramatic Oaxacan sanctuary inside the Marriott Marquis with bold murals, mezcal flights, and a vibrant antojito bar.

name: Pappas Bros. Steakhouse
address: 1200 McKinney St, Houston, TX 77010, United States
vibe_blurb: Opulent flagship steakhouse with white tablecloths, a world-class wine cellar, and flawless prime beef in the heart of downtown.

name: Toro Toro
address: 1300 Lamar St, Houston, TX 77010, United States
menu: Salmon with kimchi marinade and dashi-braised bok choy
vibe_blurb: Glitzy Pan-Latin steakhouse on the third floor of the Four Seasons Hotel with tableside carving and a lively cocktail bar.

name: Kulture
address: 701 Avenida De Las Americas Suite A, Houston, TX 77010, United States
menu: Braised Oxtail with rice and peas
vibe_blurb: Urban comfort kitchen celebrating Black culinary heritage with live music on weekends and a vibrant downtown crowd.

name: Grotto Downtown
address: 1001 Avenida De Las Americas Suite A, Houston, TX 77010, United States
vibe_blurb: Warm Italian trattoria near the George R. Brown Convention Center with a chic patio and a generous happy hour.

name: Treebeards
address: Courtyard level in the Cloister, 1117 Texas St, Houston, TX 77002, United States
menu: Red Beans & Rice with smoked link sausage
vibe_blurb: Beloved downtown lunch counter serving slow-cooked Southern Creole food since 1978; weekdays only, cash welcomed.

name: La Carafe
address: 813 Congress St, Houston, TX 77002, United States
menu: House Red Wine by the glass
House White Wine by the glass
vibe_blurb: Houston's oldest bar in an 1860 building — candlelit, cash-only, no music, allegedly haunted, and utterly irreplaceable.

name: Huynh Restaurant
address: 912 St Emanuel St, Houston, TX 77003, United States
menu: Pho Tai (rare sliced beef noodle soup)
Bún Bò Huế (spicy Hue lemongrass noodle soup)
Com Bo Luc Lac (shaking beef tenderloin on rice)
Bánh Mì Thịt (pork banh mi sandwich)
Chả Giò (fried spring rolls with nuoc cham)
vibe_blurb: Family-run Vietnamese gem just east of downtown — BYOB-friendly, no-frills décor, and some of Houston's most authentic pho.

name: Irma's Original
address: 22 N Chenevert St, Houston, TX 77002, United States
menu: Enchiladas de Pollo with green sauce
Enchiladas de Queso with chile ancho sauce
vibe_blurb: No-printed-menu Mexican institution with unbeatable lemonade and decades of old-Houston warmth near the courthouse.

name: Irma's Southwest
address: 1475 Texas Ave, Houston, TX 77002, United States
vibe_blurb: Lively Tex-Mex spot inside the Catalyst building, beloved by downtown workers and Minute Maid Park gameday crowds.

name: Brennan's of Houston
address: 3300 Smith St, Houston, TX 77006, United States
menu: Pan-Roasted Gulf Snapper with crab butter
vibe_blurb: Houston's grande dame of Creole cuisine since 1967 — chandeliered rooms, tuxedoed servers, and legendary Sunday jazz brunch.

name: Josephine's Gulf Coast Tradition
address: 318 Gray St, Houston, TX 77002, United States
vibe_blurb: Michelin-recognized Gulf Coast seafood house with porch seating, superb po'boys, and a breezy neighborhood atmosphere near Midtown.

name: Phoenicia Specialty Foods
address: 1001 Austin St, Houston, TX 77010, United States
vibe_blurb: Award-winning international food market across from Discovery Green — browse global groceries then grab a fresh Middle Eastern deli bite.

name: Nancy's Hustle
address: 2704 Polk St A, Houston, TX 77003, United States
menu: Nancy Cakes with sturgeon caviar butter
vibe_blurb: Michelin-recognized EaDo bistro blending diner nostalgia with fine technique — the caviar butter pancakes and smash burger are legendary.

name: Leaf & Grain
address: 1200 McKinney St Suite 479, Houston, TX 77010, United States
menu: Southwest Grain Bowl (farro, black beans, roasted corn, avocado)
vibe_blurb: Bright fast-casual grain bowl and salad spot in the Houston Center towers — the go-to healthy weekday lunch for downtown office workers.

name: Pho Saigon
address: 2808 Milam St D, Houston, TX 77006, United States
menu: Pho Dac Biet (house special beef pho)
Bún Bò Huế (spicy Hue-style noodle soup)
Vietnamese Iced Coffee (cà phê sữa đá)
vibe_blurb: No-frills Midtown pho institution voted Houston's best Vietnamese — giant aromatic bowls and a loyal following since the 1990s.

name: Lúa Viet Kitchen
address: 1540 W Alabama St UNIT 300, Houston, TX 77006, United States

Bánh Mì Đặc Biệt (house special banh mi)

Chè Ba Màu (three-color layered dessert drink)

name: Hugo's
address: 1600 Westheimer Rd, Houston, TX 77006, United States
menu: Camarones a la Veracruzana (Gulf shrimp in tomato-olive sauce)
vibe_blurb: Award-winning regional Mexican in Montrose with a lush tropical courtyard, elaborate Sunday brunch buffet, and James Beard pedigree.

name: POST HTX Market
address: 401 Franklin St Suite 1200, Houston, TX 77201, United States
vibe_blurb: Enormous adaptive-reuse food hall in a historic post office with rotating chef concepts and a rooftop terrace overlooking the skyline.

name: The Finn
address: 712 Main St, Houston, TX 77002, United States
menu: Proper Smash Burger (double patty, American cheese)
vibe_blurb: Chef-driven food hall in a restored Art Deco building on Main Street — ideal for diverse quick casual lunches under one roof.

name: Mai's Restaurant
address: 3403 Milam St, Houston, TX 77002, United States
menu: Pho Tai (rare sliced beef clear broth)
Chả Giò Cua (fried crab spring rolls)
Com Ga Nuong (grilled chicken rice plate)
vibe_blurb: Late-night Vietnamese mainstay open until 2 a.m. — a post-concert staple near Midtown with generous portions since 1978.

name: Ouisie's Table
address: 3939 San Felipe St, Houston, TX 77027, United States
menu: Gulf Shrimp & Grits with tasso ham
Gulf Coast Oysters on the half shell
Chicken Fried Steak with cream gravy
Peach Cobbler with vanilla ice cream
vibe_blurb: 50-year-old Southern institution with a garden terrace and white tablecloths — a beloved River Oaks brunch and dinner destination.

name: The Rustic Houston
address: 1836 Polk St, Houston, TX 77003, United States
menu: Smoked Brisket Sandwich with jalapeño aioli
vibe_blurb: Sprawling outdoor venue near EaDo with a massive patio, live music nightly, and crowd-pleasing American comfort food for groups.

name: Uchi Houston
address: 904 Westheimer Rd, Houston, TX 77006, United States
menu: Machi Cure (smoked yellowtail, yuzu, marcona almonds)
vibe_blurb: James Beard Award-winning Japanese restaurant with a minimalist Montrose interior — intimate and inventive omakase for serious sushi lovers.

name: Truth BBQ
address: 110 S Heights Blvd, Houston, TX 77007, United States
vibe_blurb: Award-winning Texas BBQ institution with 18-hour wood-fired offset smokers — expect a line, bring patience, and leave with a meat coma.

name: The Pit Room
address: 1201 Richmond Ave, Houston, TX 77006, United States
menu: Smoked Beef Brisket by the pound
vibe_blurb: Serious Montrose BBQ joint open 7 days from breakfast through dinner — picnic tables, long smoke, and zero compromises.

name: Roostar Vietnamese Grill
address: 2929 Navigation Blvd Suite 190, Houston, TX 77003, United States

vibe_blurb: Counter-service Vietnamese grill with bright flavors, fast service, and a popular in-and-out vibe for students and office workers.

name: Lúa Viet Kitchen (Heights)

menu: Bún Chả Hà Nội (grilled pork meatball vermicelli)
Cơm Tấm (broken rice, grilled pork chop)

vibe_blurb: Airy Heights Vietnamese café with minimalist décor, consistently fresh pho, and a loyal neighborhood lunch crowd.

name: Revelry on Richmond
address: 1613 Richmond Ave, Houston, TX 77006, United States
vibe_blurb: Trendy Greenway-area brunch and bar spot with a sprawling patio, craft cocktails, and a hip young-professional crowd.

name: Bludorn

menu: Seared Duck Breast with cherry jus

vibe_blurb: Sleek, buzzy downtown fine-dining destination from Aaron Bludorn — French-inflected American cuisine with a gorgeous bar and date-night energy.
